response.justification: Maria has strong technical depth and extensive experience in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and cross-platform development, with clear evidence of coding excellence and open-source contributions; however, there is minimal explicit evidence of people management, team leadership, or organizational change initiatives, and her resume lacks clarity on formal managerial responsibilities despite senior titles.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators) and testing infrastructure.
Proven track record in open-source tool development and technical advocacy through workshops and talks.
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and embedded systems with direct mobile app development experience.
concerns: No clear documentation of people management responsibilities or team leadership outcomes.
Lacks explicit mention of roadmap planning, cross-team alignment, or organizational change leadership.
Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) and lacks quantifiable impact metrics in managerial contexts.
